title: Interview Prep: Top 20 Python Coding Questions
content:
### Day 236: Interview Prep: Top 20 Python Coding Questions

**Top Python Interview Questions:**
1. Reverse a linked list
2. Two Sum problem
3. Valid parentheses
4. Merge sorted arrays
5. Binary search

**Tips:** Think aloud, discuss time/space complexity, handle edge cases.
keyTakeaways:
Binary search

Tips: Think aloud, discuss time/space complexity, handle edge cases.
